name: George Michael
abstract: George Michael (born Georgios Kyriacos Panayiotou; 25 June 1963 – 25 December 2016) was an English singer-songwriter and record producer. Regarded as a pop culture icon, he is one of the best-selling recording artists of all time.

about_quotes.speaker: David Finck
about_quotes.evidence: So as an acoustic bassist I’ve gotten a chance to record a lot of pop music, people like Rod Stewart and George Michael and Linda Ronstadt and others like that.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Finck interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 29, 2015

about_quotes.speaker: Nancy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] It was produced by Leroy Robinson, directed by George Michael, who is now on 20/20, and I think Darlene Chan was involved.
about_quotes.doc_title: Nancy Wilson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
